title: en2karp — design notes
body_markdown:
## en2karp — design notes

Three pipelines, one catalog. Each pipeline is independently runnable
and has a single job.

### Pipeline 01 — catalog
Evernote → ENEX → Obsidian vault → SQLite catalog. Idempotent,
incremental. The catalog is the single source of truth about what
exists.

### Pipeline 02 — wiki builder
Two passes. Haiku extracts per-note metadata; entity resolution
deterministically proposes articles; Sonnet synthesizes each article.
The tag filter controls scope.

### Pipeline 03 — webapp
Static PWA. Reads `catalog.json` + `metadata.json` + per-note
sidecars. Pure browser, no server. Added 2026-04-20: a selection
bridge that hands note sets back to Pipeline 02.

### Why three?
Each pipeline has a different natural cadence. Catalog reindex is
scheduled. Wiki builds are per-domain. Webapp rebuilds whenever the
catalog changes.
